page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, utilizing AMD EPYC 9T95 processors running at a baseline clock speed of 2.25 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance provides dedicated, non-shared compute resources.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This high memory density classifies the instance within the memory-optimized category. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps.

Given its high memory capacity and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. Suitable use cases include large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial RAM without local storage dependencies.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.24xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 96 physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 9T95 processors operating at 2.25 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high resource density of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 50 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large databases, and real-time data processing workloads that benefit from dedicated compute resources and high-capacity memory configurations.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-speed network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
